title: colutea glabra
intro: Colutea glabra, also known as Bladder Campion or Horse-chestnut, is a flowering plant species in the Fabaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Colutea glabra include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. The herbal preparations of Colutea glabra typically involve making a tea or infusion from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
